payload.subject: ACK turns 20-22 — concordance accepted, B3 deferred, B4 executing (turn 23)
payload.summary: All three inbound messages received. Concordance gate outcome and Sonnet-only remediation path accepted without reservation. B3 deploy deferral confirmed — deploy sequence updated to: Opus remediation → Sonnet re-score → v37 retrain → re-fit v3 calibration on v37 → deploy. B4 work order received; analysis begins immediately (gate is open). Results follow in turn 24.

ack_turn_20_concordance.spot_check_note: Sonnet-Sonnet test-retest spot-check on 10 overlapping texts (from 368-text rescore) noted and will be included after the re-score. Low cost, positive-control sanity check — good suggestion.
ack_turn_20_concordance.concordance_artifact_disposition: Retained. The 50-text concordance dataset and Opus scores will remain in analysis tables; excluded from training_data view only. As instructed.

ack_turn_21_b3.threshold_revision_accepted: Revised success criterion accepted: MAE improvement without regression per dimension (instead of max-plateau ≤ 0.5). This is a correct diagnosis — the 0.5 threshold was measuring model-layer behavior at the calibration layer.
ack_turn_21_b3.ad_n_bins_note: AD plateau worsening with n_bins=20 noted. Will evaluate n_bins=30 and 40 for AD when B3 steps 5-6 proceed post-v37.
ack_turn_21_b3.updated_deploy_sequence: Opus remediation → Sonnet re-score 999 texts → v37 retrain → re-fit v3 calibration on v37 → deploy + notify downstream

ack_turn_22_b4.gate_status: open — confirmed. Analysis independent of Opus remediation. Sonnet-only texts (n=3,433) available immediately.
